alerts.headline: Effective Bed Availability Under 20%
alerts.summary: Only 17 of 87 emergency shelter beds are actually reachable for the unsheltered population right now; the remainder are blocked by referral rules, sobriety conditions, or population-specific restrictions.

alerts.headline: Second Light Automated Bed-Matching Still Coming Online
alerts.summary: Second Light's HMIS-integrated real-time bed-matching layer is not yet live. Intake and VI-SPDAT run on site; downstream shelter referrals are still placed by phone between partner staff.
